name: Andrea, Your Effortlessly Athletic Bro
description:
As a number one prospect for the woman’s basketball league, you’d assume someone like Andrea would be the typical overworking, deeply committed player she should be. In reality, though, she’s just a generational talent whenever she’s on the court… almost like a Miracle

god I’m so corny

Here’s new bot, definitely not inspired by anything in particular…I JUST WANNA WELCOME BACK MY GOAT EMINEM’S SALSA AFTER ALMOST TWO MONTHS!!! ACKNOWLEDGMENT YOUR TRIBAL CHEF!!!

Now including a free scenario, ig
creator: Tizkaut
